# External Debt Stock (DOD) by Country and Year (Current US$)

| Country | 2018 (US$) | 2019 (US$) | 2020 (US$) | 2021 (US$) | 2022 (US$) |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Ethiopia | 26,900,000,000 | 27,800,000,000 | 28,400,000,000 | 28,900,000,000 | 29,500,000,000 |
| Kenya | 50,200,000,000 | 55,600,000,000 | 60,100,000,000 | 62,700,000,000 | 66,300,000,000 |
| Ghana | 27,100,000,000 | 28,900,000,000 | 30,400,000,000 | 33,800,000,000 | 35,200,000,000 |
| Pakistan | 104,500,000,000 | 109,200,000,000 | 112,700,000,000 | 116,900,000,000 | 121,400,000,000 |
| Bangladesh | 61,800,000,000 | 66,500,000,000 | 70,600,000,000 | 78,900,000,000 | 86,100,000,000 |
| Vietnam | 112,300,000,000 | 118,800,000,000 | 124,700,000,000 | 130,200,000,000 | 137,900,000,000 |
| Indonesia | 395,600,000,000 | 402,800,000,000 | 417,900,000,000 | 429,500,000,000 | 448,200,000,000 |
| Brazil | 558,700,000,000 | 570,100,000,000 | 587,600,000,000 | 603,400,000,000 | 621,900,000,000 |
